summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kanji learning website responsiveness and functionality across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices. All features working correctly with no critical issues found.
passed_tests: Desktop sidebar navigation - all 5 tabs (Daftar, Kartu, Kuis, Ketik, Kalimat) switch correctly
Mobile bottom navigation - all 5 tabs work perfectly
Theme toggle functionality on both desktop and mobile
Kanji List page - search input and lesson selector filtering
Flashcards page - flip animation, Next/Previous buttons, shuffle/reshuffle functionality
Quiz page - quiz type toggle (Kanji/Jukugo), mode toggle (Arti/Baca/Campur), answer selection
Typing Quiz page - input field accepts text, form submission works
Sentence Quiz page - answer options work, correct/incorrect state display
Mobile responsiveness at 375px width - no horizontal overflow
Tablet responsiveness at 768px width - proper sidebar display
Desktop layout at 1920px width - sidebar visible, content properly padded
Responsive breakpoints working correctly (mobile bottom nav vs desktop sidebar)
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Theme persistence and switching across device sizes
